stemHtml: The captain has received a calculated load sheet with his pre-flight package. The ground handler now hands over a final load sheet. In this scenario, which one does the captain have to use?

options.a: Neither one. It is his responsibility to calculate the load sheet himself.
options.b: The final load sheet provided by the ground handler.
options.c: The load sheet he has received with his pre-flight package.
options.d: It depends on the operator’s SOPs which one the captain has to use.
